name: Oriental Spicy Orange Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beef flank or round steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat medium heat oil in a wok.
2. Add meat 1/3 at a time and stir fry for 3 minutes or until browned. Return all beef to the wok.
3. Add orange peel, garlic, and ginger. Stir fry for 1 minute.
4. In a separate bowl, stir together corn starch, beef broth, soy sauce, sherry, marmalade, and red pepper.
5. Pour the mixture over the beef in the wok.
6. Stir constantly and bring to a boil over medium heat.
7. Boil for 1 minute.
8. Serve over rice. Serves 4.
